summary.narrative: 42A West Coast Park is a detached, two-storey landed house situated in an established residential enclave near West Coast Park in Singapore — approximately 8km from GoWell's Jurong Innovation District HQ. The property serves as the Zhang family's primary Singapore residence and has been the family home since acquisition in 2020. The 6,500 sqft built-up area on a 4,200 sqft freehold land plot (approx. 604 sqm / 390 sqm respectively) provides generous space for the Zhang family including live-in household staff quarters. The property carries a UOB mortgage of SGD 1.9M (USD 1,412,650) at 3.78% p.a., maturing March 2028, with annual mortgage service of approximately SGD 72,000 (USD 53,580). Including property tax, maintenance, and utility costs, total annual outflow is approximately SGD 120,000 (USD 89,300).
summary.keyMessage: USD 5.35M primary residence · SGD 7.2M · UOB mortgage SGD 1.9M @ 3.78% · 26.4% LTV · Mortgage renewal Mar 2028 — monitor rate environment

basicInfo.submarket: West Coast / Clementi — Prime District 5 Landed
basicInfo.ownershipSummary: Zhang Xi & Spouse (Joint) — Zhang Family Trust beneficiaries; property held in personal names

actions.title: UOB Mortgage Renewal Planning — Matures March 2028
actions.recommendation: Begin UOB home loan renewal process 6 months before March 2028 maturity (i.e. September 2027). Interest rate environment in 2028 is uncertain; consider obtaining comparative quotes from DBS, OCBC, and Standard Chartered. At current SGD 1.9M balance, a 0.5% rate increase adds ~SGD 9,500/yr to debt service. Given conservative 26.4% LTV, strong refinancing position.
actions.decisionNeeded: No immediate action — add to calendar for September 2027 follow-up

actions.title: Interior Refresh — Main Living Areas (10-Year Cycle)
actions.recommendation: Property was last refurbished in 2020 (at acquisition). A 10-year refresh cycle suggests minor interior renovation (kitchen cabinetry, bathrooms, repainting) in 2030; however, a mid-cycle cosmetic refresh in 2026–2027 could be considered given the property's age (28 years). Budget estimate: SGD 80,000–120,000.
actions.decisionNeeded: Family preference on timing of refresh

topRisks.title: Interest Rate Reset Risk (Mar 2028)
topRisks.impact: UOB loan repricing in Q1 2028 — if rates remain elevated, SGD 1.9M at SORA+1.1% could increase debt service by SGD 8,000–14,000/yr vs. current.

topRisks.title: Singapore Landed Property Policy Risk
topRisks.impact: Singapore government could introduce additional landed property cooling measures; current ABSD regime not applicable (Zhang Xi is Singapore PR/Citizen).

topRisks.title: Property Age & Maintenance
topRisks.impact: 1998-built structure — roof, waterproofing, and M&E systems approaching end of life; major maintenance capex of SGD 50,000–150,000 possible in 5–10 years.

marketSnapshot.submarket: West Coast / Clementi — Freehold Detached Landed
marketSnapshot.medianRentPM2: SGD 45,000–70,000 (monthly rental for equivalent detached houses, if let)
marketSnapshot.vacancyRate: Very low — Freehold landed Singapore is highly constrained supply
marketSnapshot.assetVsMarket: Owner-occupied — not rented; market rent for comparable SGD 18,000–22,000/mo; estimated 3.0–3.7% gross yield if let
